title: Generating time-consistent dynamics with discriminator-guided image diffusion models

method.approach: Novel discriminator guidance approach inspired by temporal discriminators in GANs
key_features: Lightweight and efficient, adding only 3%-8% to generation time
Makes extensions to new downstream tasks straightforward
applications: Generating realistic, time-consistent, and stable spatiotemporal dynamics
Downscaling applications using super-resolution techniques in fluid dynamics

performance: Performs similarly well as a VDM trained from scratch in terms of temporal dynamics
results.stability: Enables stable climate simulations for more than 100 years, while VDMs exhibit unstable drifts in global averages

video_gans.contribution: Introduced the idea of using an adversarial discriminator for temporally-consistent videos
Further developed the idea of using adversarial discriminators for video generation
